name: Something Different Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
Cream butter or margarine and sugar, then add egg yolks and beat well. Add melted chocolate, milk, and softened cake yeast dissolved in 1/4 cup lukewarm water. Add flour and salt, beating until combined. Fold in beaten egg whites. Let the batter stand overnight at room temperature.
In the morning, mix icing ingredients: sugar, water, and cornstarch until thickened to a soft ball stage (238°F). Gradually fold this into the beaten egg whites until well incorporated and resembling cream. Add confectioners sugar and melted baking chocolate. Pour over the top of the cooled cake and sprinkle with toasted coconut.
Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes in prepared, greased, and floured cake pans.
